# Al Fajr Contracting Company

> General contracting and industrial services across Saudi Arabia — civil & MEP works, manpower supply and equipment/fleet solutions. Tagline: "Together We Can".

Al Fajr Contracting Company (Arabic: شركة الفجر للمقاولات) is a Saudi Arabia–based general contracting and
industrial-services company. We deliver civil and industrial construction, MEP, specialized
systems, earthworks, finishing, equipment/fleet and manpower solutions across the Kingdom of
Saudi Arabia. We are a licensed and registered entity (Commercial Registration, VAT/ZATCA,
TGA road-freight licence, Saudi National Address).

## Key pages
- [Home](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/)
- [Services](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services)
- [Sectors](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/sectors)
- [About](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/about)
- [Clients & Partners](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/clients)
- [Contact](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/contact)

## Services (32 total)

### Civil & Construction
- [Civil Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/civil-work): Engineers, supervisors and a skilled workforce executing every phase to high safety and quality standards.
- [Concrete & Plaster Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/concrete-plaster-work): Durable concrete and clean plaster finishes built to engineering specification.
- [Block Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/block-work): Accurate blockwork for partitions, boundary walls and load-bearing elements.
- [Renovations & Extensions](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/renovations-extensions): Upgrades, refurbishments and extensions that add space and value with minimal disruption.
- [Architectural & Structural Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/architectural-structural-work): Architectural detailing and structural elements executed to drawing and specification.

### MEP — Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing
- [Mechanical Services](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/mechanical-services): Full mechanical scope for industrial, commercial and infrastructure projects.
- [Electrical Solutions](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/electrical-solutions): Certified electricians delivering residential, commercial and industrial solutions.
- [Plumbing Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/plumbing-work): Water supply, drainage and sanitary installations that are clean, tested and leak-free.
- [Pipe Line Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/pipe-line-work): Pipeline fabrication and installation for process, utility and infrastructure systems.
- [Ducting](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/ducting): HVAC ductwork fabricated and installed for efficient, balanced air distribution.
- [Cable Tray](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/cable-tray): Cable containment and tray systems that keep electrical infrastructure safe and organised.

### Specialized Systems
- [Fire Fighting System](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/fire-fighting-system): Reliable systems protecting lives, property and operations.
- [Security & Smart System](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/security-smart-system): Security and smart automation protecting people and assets while improving efficiency.
- [Industrial Refrigeration](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/industrial-refrigeration): Engineered refrigeration for demanding operations across the Kingdom.
- [Power Solutions](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/power-solutions): Power systems for modern industry, commercial facilities and critical infrastructure.

### Earthworks & Site Logistics
- [Excavation & Demolition](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/excavation-demolition): Experienced teams and specialised equipment delivering on time and on budget.
- [Grading & Backfilling](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/grading-backfilling): Quality materials and proven compaction methods meeting engineering specifications.
- [Leveling & Compaction](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/leveling-compaction): Site preparation through final surface finishing on a solid, well-compacted base.
- [Material & Asphalt Supply](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/material-asphalt-supply): Reliable, timely supply for infrastructure, roadwork and building projects.
- [Loading & Transportation](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/loading-transportation): Efficient, safe and cost-effective loading and transport tailored to the project.
- [Waste Removal](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/waste-removal): Fast, safe and environmentally responsible removal for construction and industrial sites.
- [Site Preparation & Earthworks](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/site-preparation-earthworks): Getting sites ready — clearing, earthworks and groundworks done right from the start.

### Finishing Works
- [Gypsum Board](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/gypsum-board): Partitions and ceilings in gypsum board for clean lines and fast, tidy installation.
- [Painting Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/painting-work): Interior and exterior painting with proper preparation for a durable, even finish.
- [Marble & Tiles Work](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/marble-tiles-work): Precise marble and tiling for floors and walls with crisp lines and level surfaces.
- [Hand Railing](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/hand-railing): Handrails and balustrades fabricated and fixed for safety and a clean finish.

### Equipment & Fleet
- [Rental Equipment](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/rental-equipment): A broad range of well-maintained equipment to complete projects safely and on budget.
- [Dump Truck Rental](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/dump-truck-rental): Dump trucks for earthmoving and haulage, available with experienced operators.
- [Diesel Supply Truck](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/diesel-supply-truck): On-site diesel delivery that keeps plant and generators fuelled and productive.

### Manpower & Operations
- [Manpower Supply](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/manpower-supply): Skilled and unskilled manpower to meet diverse industry needs across the Kingdom.
- [Maintenance & Operation Services](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/maintenance-operation-services): Keeping assets, facilities and equipment at peak efficiency.
- [Maintenance & Support](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/services/maintenance-support): Dependable technical support that keeps operations running between major works.

## Sectors
- [Residential](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/sectors#residential): Concrete work, structural detailing, renovations and extensions for residential properties.
- [Commercial](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/sectors#commercial): Commercial builds and fit-outs with integrated MEP, finishing and systems.
- [Industrial](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/sectors#industrial): Plant and facility construction and maintenance — mechanical, electrical, refrigeration and power.
- [Oil & Gas](https://alfajrcontractingco.com/sectors#oil-gas): Excavation, backfilling and concrete for industrial and oil & gas infrastructure.
